Plus, kids think I look like an Avenger;My son's and my favorite;Great Protection" | split: ";" %} {% assign bodies = "While researching and building a spreadsheet on better protective gear for my daughter, I stumbled upon Titan. I asked around and nobody had heard of them, some even balked a bit at the price. A higher cost for quality product and better protection is a no brainer to my wife and I for a sport our daughter loves. The color she wanted wasn't in stock so I decided to buy one for myself (casual player) and my younger son who is just starting out. We got them and tried them on right away. No Velcro, easy to put on and comfy, let's just say my daughter was jealous and has been waiting for the Miami Vice color to be back in stock. The fit and feel are great, we are excited to upgrade from her major retail brand cutshirt to Titan. We were a bit curious if the No Velcro neck is the right way to go, but after reading some reviews, we feel it will be the better option as her hair gets caught and tangled in the Velcro on her current shirt. High quality neck and wrist protection plus some style all equals an easy purchase for us to have extra peace of mind while our kid is out there battling for the puck.^My son absolutely loves the fit of these shirts. We have bought three so far and they are all in great shape even after a year of washing them every week. I like the protection of the risk guards and the neck guard combined. We always used to buy Bauer shirts which are good as well, but not as good as these. If you purchase, you will not be disappointed.^The shirt provides exactly what it says, the neck and wrist guards are a huge improvement on what my son had before and he likes putting it on over the old guards he used. The only reason I go for 4 stars is the body and sleeves of the shirt come across as subpar for the price.^While researching and building a spreadsheet on better protective gear for my daughter, I stumbled upon Titan. I asked around and nobody had heard of them, some even balked a bit at the price. A higher cost for quality product and better protection is a no brainer to my wife and I for a sport our daughter loves. The color she wanted wasn't in stock so I decided to buy one for myself (casual player) and my younger son who is just starting out. We got them and tried them on right away. No Velcro, easy to put on and comfy, let's just say my daughter was jealous and has been waiting for the Miami Vice color to be back in stock. The fit and feel are great, we are excited to upgrade from her major retail brand cutshirt to Titan. We were a bit curious if the No Velcro neck is the right way to go, but after reading some reviews, we feel it will be the better option as her hair gets caught and tangled in the Velcro on her current shirt. High quality neck and wrist protection plus some style all equals an easy purchase for us to have extra peace of mind while our kid is out there battling for the puck.^I bought a Titan BattleGear tee to rep the brand off-the-ice and it’s soft, high-quality, and looks cool. The colors look sharp and people have even stopped to ask me what Titan is! Proud to be repping Titan around.^Shirts are expensive and material pulls. At this price point that should not happen so easily.^Great fit, great color - very happy with this purchase.^Great shirt! First hockey shirt that my son loves! Very comfortable! The colors look sharp and people have even stopped to ask me what Titan is! Proud to be repping Titan around.^While researching and building a spreadsheet on better protective gear for my daughter, I stumbled upon Titan. I asked around and nobody had heard of them, some even balked a bit at the price. A higher cost for quality product and better protection is a no brainer to my wife and I for a sport our daughter loves. The color she wanted wasn't in stock so I decided to buy one for myself (casual player) and my younger son who is just starting out. We got them and tried them on right away. No Velcro, easy to put on and comfy, let's just say my daughter was jealous and has been waiting for the Miami Vice color to be back in stock. The fit and feel are great, we are excited to upgrade from her major retail brand cutshirt to Titan. We were a bit curious if the No Velcro neck is the right way to go, but after reading some reviews, we feel it will be the better option as her hair gets caught and tangled in the Velcro on her current shirt. High quality neck and wrist protection plus some style all equals an easy purchase for us to have extra peace of mind while our kid is out there battling for the puck.^My son was sick of his other bully in neck guard base layers velcro popping open all the time. We tried the Titan BG 2.0 and my son loved it. No more fixing his neck guard, super light and comfy base layer. And I love the way it fits and protects him.^The fit was perfect and provides much more coverage than the other brand we were using. We transitioned to the adapt (slip-on) which completely eliminates the velcro and was always the first thing that wore out on our other neck guard shirts. The extra cost is offset by the added life these have. I would highly recommend this product to anyone looking to protect their hockey player.^Great fit, great color - very happy with this purchase.^My son was sick of his other bully in neck guard base layers velcro popping open all the time. We tried the Titan BG 2.0 and my son loved it. No more fixing his neck guard, super light and comfy base layer. And I love the way it fits and protects him.^These shirts are great. The protection they provide is also great. My grandsons love everything about these shirts, but the best thing is NO MORE VELCRO around their necks. They were so happy do be able to ditch the velcro neck guards." | split: "^" %} {% assign headings = "Safety Reviews;Performance, Durability & Quality Reviews;Comfort & Fit Reviews;Style & Color Reviews;No Velcro Reviews;'I Just Love It' Reviews" | split: ";" %} {% assign descriptions = "See how Titan’s built-in, A9 cut-resistant protection gives players peace of mind every time they hit the ice.;Players talk about how Titan gear holds up under pressure - game after game, season after season.;From practice to playoffs, hear how Titan stays comfortable, secure, and distraction-free.;Bold colors.
